name: address-pr-comments
description: Address PR review feedback with systematic comment resolution and remote sync

context_triggers: pull request review comments need resolution

instructions: Categorize PR comments by type: required changes, suggestions, questions, nits
Address required changes first, then suggestions that improve quality
Respond to each comment explaining what was changed and why
Run tests after each batch of changes to catch regressions early
Sync with remote before pushing to avoid force-push conflicts
